title: Fault-Tolerant Compilation
description: Learn to compile quantum algorithms for fault-tolerant execution, including gate synthesis, circuit optimization, and logical-to-physical mapping.
learningObjectives: Understand the compilation pipeline from high-level algorithms to fault-tolerant circuits
Implement gate decomposition into native fault-tolerant gate sets
Apply circuit optimization techniques to minimize resource overhead
Design compilation strategies for different error correction codes
Analyze the trade-offs between circuit depth, width, and T-count
